---
title: "Data Sources"
date: last-modified
format:
  html:
    embed-resources: false 
    toc: true
    number-sections: false
---


## Main data sources

| DATASOURCE/DATASET                          | url                                                                                                                                                          |
|:--------------------------------------------|:-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|
| WAHIS                                       | [https://wahis.woah.org/#/home](https://wahis.woah.org/#/home)                                                                                               |
| EIOS                                        | [https://www.who.int/initiatives/eios](https://www.who.int/initiatives/eios)                                                                                 |
| FAOSTAT                                     | [https://www.fao.org/faostat/en/%23data](https://www.fao.org/faostat/en/%23data) |
| WorldClim                                   | [https://worldclim.org/](https://worldclim.org/)                                                                                                             |
| FAO HiH Geospatial data                     | [https://www.fao.org/hih-geospatial-platform/en/](https://www.fao.org/hih-geospatial-platform/en/)                                                           |
| Global Forest Watch data portal             | [https://www.globalforestwatch.org/](https://www.globalforestwatch.org/)                                                                                     |
| SPS notifications eping - WTO               | [https://eping.wto.org/en/Search/Index](https://eping.wto.org/en/Search/Index)                                                                               |
| GLW                                         | [https://data.apps.fao.org/catalog/dataset/glw](https://data.apps.fao.org/catalog/dataset/glw)                                                               |
| Geographic and administrative boundary GADM | [https://gadm.org/](https://gadm.org/)                                                                                                                       |
| WOAH Observatory                            | [https://www.woah.org/en/document/observatory-annual-report-indicator-matrix/](https://www.woah.org/en/document/observatory-annual-report-indicator-matrix/) |
| ANIMUSE                                     | [https://amu.woah.org/amu-system-portal/amu-data](https://amu.woah.org/amu-system-portal/amu-data)                                                           |
| WTO Data                                    | [https://stats.wto.org/](https://stats.wto.org/)                                                                                                             |
| OpenSky                                     |                                                                                                                                                              |
| IPUMS                                       | [https://www.ipums.org/](https://www.ipums.org/)                                                                                                             |
| OpenStreetMap                               | [https://www.openstreetmap.org/](https://www.openstreetmap.org/)                                                                                                                                                             |
| Eurostat                                   | [https://ec.europa.eu/eurostat/data/database](https://ec.europa.eu/eurostat/data/database)                                                                   |


## Obtaining WAHIS immediate notifications and follow-up reports (INFUR) data


- Sign up to WAHIS support: [https://wahis-support.woah.org/support/home](https://wahis-support.woah.org/support/home)


<!-- - Browse Help articles on [https://wahis-support.woah.org/support/solutions](https://wahis-support.woah.org/support/solutions) -->


<!-- - Go to [Service Catalog](https://wahis-support.woah.org/support/solutions/articles/51000048118-Service-Catalog-Catalogue-de-services-Cat-logo-de-servicios) -->

- Request [access to the weekly extraction of WAHIS immediate notifications and follow-up reports](https://wahis-support.woah.org/support/catalog/items/45)
